channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Own a piece of storage history - Cerabyte gives away framed ceramic on glass media samples containing copies of the US Constitution
item.description: Cerabyte’s glass-based storage showcases permanent, low-energy data preservation, sparking new ideas for cloud infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: AI flaw leaked Gmail data before OpenAI patch
item.description: Cybersecurity experts warn about a ShadowLeak vulnerability that weaponized ChatGPT's Deep Research agent to steal personal data from Gmail accounts through hidden commands.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to watch Sunderland vs Wolves: live stream Premier League 2025/26 game, TV channels, preview, team news
item.description: All the ways to watch Sunderland vs Wolves as the Black Country club seek their first win of the season on Wearside.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: Tesla's self-driving cars under fire again
item.description: Tesla's Full Self-Driving system faces federal investigation following 58 reports of crashes, with six vehicles running red lights before colliding with other cars.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Threat actors are spreading malicious extensions via VS marketplaces
item.description: Careless developers publishing Visual Studio extensions to two open marketplaces have been including access tokens and other secrets that can be exploited by threat actors, a security vendor has found.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Sex could become the next big business opportunity for AI companies
item.description: ChatGPT will be able to have kinkier conversations after OpenAI CEO Sam Altman announced the artificial intelligence company will soon allow its chatbot to engage in “erotica for verified adults.” OpenAI won’t be the first to try to profit from sexualized AI.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: The Wildlife Photographer of the Year 2025 awards were dominated by one pro camera – and it isn’t the one you might expect
item.description: Wildlife Photographer Of The Year 2025 finalists chose this one standout Canon camera the most, and it's not even a flagship model
item.dc:creator: Peter Fenech, TechRadar

item.title: Hi-fi legend Quad's new super-powerful, super-connected stereo amp could be all the amp you need for the rest of your life
item.description: Money No Object: Quad launches its "finest-ever" integrated amp, and it's future-proofed in a ton of ways
item.dc:creator: Carrie Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: Maine Senate candidate faces more resurfaced Reddit posts
item.description: Reports have found additional controversial social media posts Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner made years before his bid to oust Sen. Susan Collins (R).
item.dc:creator: Surina Venkat, The Hill

item.title: A new DFARS rule could block defense contracts for firms with foreign consulting ties
item.description: "Even though those carve outs might limit application to specific activities the firms do, it may not completely cover all the activities," said Diz Locaria. The post A new DFARS rule could block defense contracts for firms with foreign consulting ties first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Putting AI agents to work in IT
item.description: Over the next 12 to 24 months, AI agents are expected to revolutionize every facet of business. According to PwC’s AI Agent Survey, 75% of respondents believe AI agents will reshape the workplace even more than the Internet did in the past.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: ChatGPT to allow erotica
item.description: The Fox News AI Newsletter brings you the latest developments on artificial intelligence, with news on OpenAI moving to soon allow erotica for adult users.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: You can't buy the Dell Pro Max GB10 yet but you can buy the Asus Ascent GX10 right now for $4100 - Get Nvidia's Petaflop desktop supercomputer shipped within days
item.description: You can’t buy the Dell Pro Max GB10 yet but the Asus Ascent GX10 with Nvidia’s Grace Blackwell chip is available for $4100.
item.dc:creator: Wayne Williams, TechRadar

item.title: I helped build the internet’s ad economy. Now I want to save it
item.description: If you’ve noticed that the internet feels different lately—more cluttered, harder to navigate—you’re not imagining it. The system is breaking down in real time, and by 2026, researchers predict that 90% of web content will be AI-generated.
item.dc:creator: Brian O'Kelley, Fast Company

item.title: Former Google CEO warns AI systems can be hacked to become extremely dangerous weapons
item.description: Eric Schmidt alerts that hackers can reverse-engineer AI models to bypass safety measures, citing examples like the jailbroken ChatGPT variant called DAN.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Uber lanza un programa piloto para que sus conductores entrenen a la IA
item.description: Tras su entrada en el ámbito del etiquetado de datos el año pasado con el lanzamiento de una nueva división, Scaled Solutions, Uber presentó este jueves un proyecto piloto en el mercado estadounidense en el que sus conductores, al igual que sus homólogos de la India, anotarán datos para su uso en el
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Big Tech is paying millions to train teachers on AI, in a push to bring chatbots into classrooms
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — On a scorching hot Saturday in San Antonio, dozens of teachers traded a day off for a glimpse of the future. The topic of the day’s workshop: enhancing instruction with artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: JOCELYN GECKER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Unions sue Trump administration over social media vetting of visa holders
item.description: Three labor unions sued the Trump administration Thursday in connection with a program that searched social media posts of visa holders, arguing that it violates the First Amendment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mancini, The Hill

item.title: Meta details cutting-edge networking technologies for AI infrastructure
item.description: Meta shared details about its AI and networking advances at this week’s 2025 OCP Global Summit in San Jose, Calif.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Energy Department offers $1.6 billion loan guarantee to upgrade transmission lines across Midwest
item.description: The Department of Energy says it has finalized a $1.6 billion loan guarantee to a subsidiary of one of the nation’s largest power companies to upgrade nearly 5,000 miles of transmission lines across five states, mostly in the Midwest, for largely fossil fuel-run energy.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Daly, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Voice AI issues – the clunky speech, weird pauses and inaccuracies
item.description: Voice AI technology has been around for years. But clunky voices, awkward pauses, and problems with accuracy have been roadblocks to widespread adoption.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OpenAI–Broadcom alliance signals a shift to open infrastructure for AI
item.description: OpenAI has partnered with Broadcom to co-develop and deploy its first in-house AI processors. The move could reshape data center networking dynamics and chip supply strategies as the ChatGPT maker races to secure more computing power for its rapidly growing AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: SpaceX launches the 11th test flight of its mega Starship rocket with another win
item.description: SpaceX launched another of its mammoth Starship rockets on a test flight Monday, successfully making it halfway around the world while releasing mock satellites like last time. Starship — the biggest and most powerful rocket ever built — thundered into the evening sky from the southern tip of Texas.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: OpenAI partners with Broadcom to design its own AI chips
item.description: OpenAI said Monday it is working with chipmaker Broadcom to design its own artificial intelligence computer chips. The two California companies didn't disclose the financial terms of the deal but said they will start deploying the new racks of customized “AI accelerators” late next year.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange 2025: Federal, industry IT leaders on how agencies are preparing for post-quantum cybersecurity
item.description: Air Force, CISA, NIST share how they are preparing for a future when quantum computers could break today’s encryption. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange 2025: Federal, industry IT leaders on how agencies are preparing for post-quantum cybersecurity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: How to run RAG projects for better data analytics results
item.description: The arrival of generative AI-enhanced business intelligence (GenBI) for enterprise data analytics has opened up access to insights, while also increasing the speed, relevance and accuracy of those insights. But that’s in best-case scenarios.
item.dc:creator: Info World
